speaker: MATT
raw_text: You're in a room, you're in a 20-foot-by-20-foot room, with two small white orbs on the sides that are kinda set into the walls to give off a faint white arcane glow. There's a single doorway that exits the room that is currently closed.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I think we should get it out of her view before--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think we should put it in the Bag of Holding.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sure, yeah. Do you want to teleport it in the bag?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: If your crushing couldn't kill it, the thousand pounds?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: We can store it there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Where are we? You said we're in a room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a small yellow room, sorry, a small white stone room and there is a kind of yellowish brown stone doorway that is closed. There's some very faint white orbs that are locked into the wall. So you're not in Greyskull Keep now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, we're not in Greyskull.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys don't have a teleportation circle installed in your Keep yet. You don't know where you are.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're in a room right now?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So. Eventually you all manage to make your way towards the outer wall of Emon to the southern portion of the city. The guards let you through. Two of them recognize you from the Winter's Crest celebration that occurred about seven months beforehand. Don't do that, that's going to end poorly. You make your way around the bend to the large grass hill that is surrounded by the river that skirts the outer southern portion of Greyskull Keep. Looking up, you can see against the moonlight the very welcome sight of your home there, beckoning to you to rest. You make your way to the front gates that surround the outskirts of it, and an iron bell kind of goes off for a second, and as you look up, you hear a voice go, "Who goes there? Speak your mind, or a bolt to the throat you'll find."
trigger_phrase: You make your way to the front gates

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: And we still have, if we get to 400, correct, next? Lucas?

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: If we get to 3,400 by the end of the night, we'll give away a whole other kit like this, with the signed stuff, so you get to subscribe and it supports the channel, keeps us running. I'm not going to interrupt these guys, so when we hit the number I'm just going to give it away through the chat room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Awesome, guys. Well done and congrats to whoever ends up getting that, real fast I hope. So, thank you Overlord.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh wait, this is in here. Can I throw this? Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Pass it off, it's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You get the horn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I hold it for a second?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: No. Oh, I mean in real life. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I was like, don't touch it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You sleep hard, you sleep for an extended period, eventually you all begin to rouse, as you all wake up, the smell of fresh breakfast food is already coming to--

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I did leave a little rat turd before I got scooped out. Just so you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Trinket, let's go to bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I turn, I go Minxie and I curl up by the fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, Minxie!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan! Turn Tiberius back into a rat.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Oh yes, I'm going to bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Back into a rat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You can curl up with me.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Would you like to be a rat?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I like being furry.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well then, no. I'm still punishing you. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: That's fine. Have your fun tonight, people, you will have your licking in the morning. I go to sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You guys all go to rest for the evening, the best rest you've had in a long time, your beds are comfortable, well set, it's a warm interior.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm starfished on my bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is the first time in a while that Pike, you've been able to sleep without your armor on, and it's so nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's great.
